title: podocarpus cupressinus
intro: Podocarpus cupressinus, also known as the Chinese plum yew or Chinese cedar, is a species of coniferous plant in the family Podocarpaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Podocarpus cupressinus include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves steaming the leaves and using them as a tea or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
